session_states.description: App cold launch. WebGL canvas initialises, Cocos engine boots, asset bundles preload. Anonymous auth is performed via POST /v1/auth/anonymous (body: { device_id, platform }). No hard login wall — anonymous token is issued immediately and stored for subsequent API calls.
session_states.recoverability: retry on network timeout; anonymous auth never hard-blocks launch because device_id is generated locally
session_states.automated_path: navigate to GAME_URL → waitForSelector('canvas', visible, 30s) → waitForTimeout(2000ms) — canvas present signals engine ready
session_states.screenshot_checkpoint: splash logo (Glow Island wordmark) visible, canvas rendered, no black frame

session_states.description: Anonymous token obtained (or loaded from localStorage). MainMenuScene.start() calls ProgressionManager.loadFromCloud() then sets cloud status to Synced/Offline. Buttons: Start Game → LevelSelectScene, Continue → GameScene (last level via director._lastLevel), Leaderboard, Shop, Settings, Zen Mode.
session_states.recoverability: cloud load failure falls back to localStorage; no state loss
session_states.save_resume_notes: GameSession.getPendingResumeLevel() reads localStorage key 'glow_island_resume_level'; if present, director._lastLevel is set and MainMenuScene.continueButton becomes active
session_states.automated_path: after canvas ready: look for 'Start Game' button (text locator) or click canvas(0.5, 0.6) as fallback
session_states.screenshot_checkpoint: main menu buttons visible: Start Game, Continue (dimmed if no save), Leaderboard, Shop, ZenMode; cloud-status icon present

session_states.description: IslandMapScene shows the 6-chapter island layout. Tapping a level node that is unlocked transitions to GameScene with that level's id stored in director._lastLevel. Locked chapter nodes show a lock-prompt toast. Back navigation returns to MainMenuScene.
session_states.recoverability: no network required; progression data read from ProgressionManager (localStorage-backed)
session_states.automated_path: from main menu click 'Start Game' → director.loadScene('LevelSelectScene') → tap first unlocked level node (canvas(0.5, 0.5) heuristic for level 1-1)
session_states.screenshot_checkpoint: island map rendered, chapter 1 nodes visible, locked chapters show lock icon overlay

session_states.description: GameScene.start() fires. GameSession.start(levelId) transitions internal state loading → playing. LevelLoader loads level config from Cocos resources bundle 'levels/all-levels' (falls back to INLINE_FALLBACK_LEVELS for editor/test). TileGrid, ObstacleManager, BoardEventManager initialised. Chapter BGM begins. HUD wired.
blocking_modals: NPCDialog (optional narrative beat, auto-dismisses after player tap)
session_states.recoverability: if LevelLoader throws (level not found or validation failure), GameScene logs error and remains on loading state; retry requires scene reload
session_states.automated_path: after tapping level on island map, wait 1500ms for GameScene load; verify URL contains 'game' or level=1 indicator
session_states.screenshot_checkpoint: board grid visible (528x528px at design res), HUD moves counter visible, tiles populated, no FailPopup/LevelCompletePopup active

session_states.description: GameSession state = 'playing'. Player selects tile pairs; GameScene.tryMatch() validates path (TileMatcher.findPath ≤2-turn L/Z rule), checks ObstacleManager.isPathBlocked(), clears matched cells, fires SFX (TILE_CONNECT, TILE_DISAPPEAR), updates ComboTracker, decrements movesRemaining via GameSession.onMoveMade(). BoardEventManager handles board_rotate, tile_fall, freeze_zone, water_current events. SpecialBlock auto-generation occurs at combo thresholds.
blocking_modals: SwapSelectionOverlay (10s timeout when SWAP special fires)
session_states.recoverability: PauseMenu → resume(); SwapSelectionOverlay auto-cancels on timeout
session_states.automated_path: click canvas(0.4, 0.35) then canvas(0.5, 0.35) for first tile pair; repeat 3 times for combo attempt
session_states.screenshot_checkpoint: board shows cleared cells after match, move counter decremented, combo label updates (if combo active)

session_states.description: GameSession.onObjectivesMet() → _completeLevel() → state = 'levelComplete'. Stars computed: 3 stars = 0 continues AND movesRemaining ≥ 3; 2 stars = 0 continues; 1 star = any continue used. GameScene._onSessionEnded() fires SFX.LEVEL_COMPLETE and calls LevelCompletePopup.show(). Popup animates: score → stars pop-in sequence → material reward fly-in. ProgressionManager.addMaterials() + updateChapterProgress() + syncToCloud() (PUT /v1/save/:player_id) run immediately. AreaRestorationEffect.playStage() fires if restoration stage advances.
blocking_modals: LevelCompletePopup (modal, must tap Next Level or Back to Map to dismiss)
session_states.recoverability: syncToCloud failure is warned but non-blocking; local progress always persists via ProgressionManager localStorage
session_states.save_resume_notes: cloud sync fires PUT /v1/save/:player_id; E2E TC-001 intercepts this request as validation
session_states.automated_path: after completing all objectives (tiles cleared >= objectiveTarget), wait for LevelCompletePopup to appear; tap 'Next Level' button or 'Back to Map' button
session_states.screenshot_checkpoint: LevelCompletePopup visible: star row (1-3 stars lit), score label, material reward badges, Next Level and Back to Map buttons

session_states.description: GameSession state = 'failed'. Triggered when movesRemaining reaches 0 and objectives are unmet (GameSession.onMoveMade), or when ObstacleManager.isBoardOverrun() fires GameSession.failNow(). EVENT: SESSION_FAILED emitted. GameScene._onSessionFailed() looks for scene child 'FailPopup' and sets active=true. If FailPopup node not found, fallback: director.loadScene('IslandMapScene') after 2s delay.
session_states.recoverability: continue flow available up to CONTINUE_MAX=3 times if glowstones >= 6; after max continues or no glowstones, exit to island map
session_states.automated_path: exhaust all moves without meeting objectives; FailPopup activates; tap 'Exit' to return to map or tap 'Continue' to trigger continue flow
session_states.screenshot_checkpoint: FailPopup visible with Continue button (shows glowstone cost=6) and Exit button; board still visible behind dimmed backdrop

session_states.description: Player is on FailPopup after moves exhausted. Two choices: (A) tap Continue → GameSession.continue(glowstones) deducts 6 glowstones, adds CONTINUE_MOVES_ADDED=5 moves, transitions state failed → playing; (B) tap Exit → director.loadScene('IslandMapScene'). continue() returns false if continuesUsed >= CONTINUE_MAX=3 or glowstones < 6.
session_states.recoverability: insufficient glowstones: continue button is disabled or shows IAP shop prompt; exit always available
session_states.automated_path: tap 'Continue' button in popup; verify moves counter resets to +5; board becomes interactive again
session_states.screenshot_checkpoint: popup dismissed, HUD moves counter shows +5 added, board re-enabled (no dim overlay)

session_states.description: Player taps 'Back to Map' on LevelCompletePopup or 'Exit' on FailPopup. LevelCompletePopup._onBackToMap() calls director.loadScene('IslandMapScene'). Island map shows updated chapter progress (newly unlocked levels/chapters reflected).
session_states.recoverability: scene transition via SystemOverlay fade (island_sand #F7EDD8, ≤0.4s); no data loss risk
session_states.automated_path: tap 'Back to Map' button in LevelCompletePopup; waitForTimeout(1500ms); verify island map canvas visible
session_states.screenshot_checkpoint: IslandMapScene loaded; updated level node states (completed star count badges visible); previously locked nodes potentially unlocked

session_states.description: Player taps 'Next Level' on LevelCompletePopup. LevelCompletePopup._onNextLevel() hides popup and emits director event 'levelComplete_nextLevel'. GameScene listens and loads the sequential next level by incrementing the level id (e.g. '1-1' → '1-2'). New GameSession.start() fires for the next level.
session_states.recoverability: if next level not found by LevelLoader, scene falls back to IslandMapScene
session_states.automated_path: tap 'Next Level' button in LevelCompletePopup; wait 1500ms; verify new board is initialised (tile count differs from previous level if grid_size changes)
session_states.screenshot_checkpoint: new level board rendered; HUD moves counter reset to new level's max_moves; level id updated

session_states.description: Player taps Zen Mode on MainMenuScene. ZenModeManager.consumeSlot() checks daily quota (slots reset daily). If slot available: ZenModeManager.enterZenMode() → director.loadScene('GameScene'). Zen mode sets max_moves = null (no move limit). On moves reaching 0, _triggerZenComplete() emits 'zenComplete' with decoration reward instead of SESSION_FAILED. Toast '今日禅境次数已用完，明天再来' shown if quota exhausted.
session_states.recoverability: quota exhausted: toast shown, no scene change; zen complete: decoration reward emitted, graceful return flow
session_states.automated_path: tap Zen Mode button on main menu; if quota available, GameScene loads in zen mode; play proceeds without move limit
session_states.screenshot_checkpoint: ZenModeHUD visible (distinct from GameHUD), no moves counter or infinite indicator, board active

session_states.description: Player taps pause button in GameHUD. GameSession.pause() transitions playing → paused. PauseMenu shown (settings, quit-to-map). Resume: GameSession.resume() → playing. Quit: director.loadScene('IslandMapScene') + GameSession.exitMidSession() which saves current levelId to localStorage key 'glow_island_resume_level' for continue-from-map flow.
session_states.recoverability: exitMidSession() writes resume key; if storage unavailable, key is lost silently but no crash
session_states.save_resume_notes: localStorage key 'glow_island_resume_level' set; MainMenuScene will activate continueButton on next launch
session_states.automated_path: tap pause button (top-right of HUD per view-mode-runtime-contract); tap Resume to return, or Quit to exit
session_states.screenshot_checkpoint: PauseMenu overlay visible with dimmed backdrop; board frozen (no input); Resume and Quit buttons accessible

continue_iap_flow.trigger: movesRemaining == 0 AND objectivesMet == false AND GameSession.state transitions to 'failed'
continue_iap_flow.action_yes: GameSession.continue(currentGlowstones): deducts 6 glowstones from _glowstones, adds 5 to _movesRemaining, increments _continuesUsed, transitions state failed → playing; continuesUsed > 0 means max star rating drops to 1
continue_iap_flow.action_no: player taps Exit on FailPopup → GameScene navigates to IslandMapScene via director.loadScene (or 2s auto-fallback if FailPopup node not found)
continue_iap_flow.automation: after board exhausts moves, waitForTimeout(500ms); locate 'Continue' button in FailPopup (canvas(0.5, 0.55) heuristic); tap to confirm continue
continue_iap_flow.insufficient_glowstones_behaviour: continue() returns false; UI should show IAP shop prompt (ShopScene) or disable the Continue button
continue_iap_flow.star_penalty: any continue usage: final star rating capped at 1 star regardless of movesRemaining at completion
continue_iap_flow.board_overrun_path: ObstacleManager.isBoardOverrun() → GameSession.failNow() → same FailPopup flow; no continue allowed for board-overrun if design restricts it (implementation: continue() only checks state==failed, so board-overrun can continue if glowstones allow)

exit_mid_session_flow.trigger: player taps quit in PauseMenu during active gameplay
exit_mid_session_flow.resume_on_next_launch: MainMenuScene._updateContinueButton() enables continueButton; _onContinue() reads ProgressionManager.getCurrentProgress() to find lastLevel and sets director._lastLevel; director.loadScene('GameScene')

scene_transition_map.LevelSelectScene/IslandMapScene → GameSc: level node tap → sets director._lastLevel → director.loadScene('GameScene')
scene_transition_map.GameScene → IslandMapScene: LevelCompletePopup 'Back to Map' OR FailPopup 'Exit' OR PauseMenu 'Quit' → director.loadScene('IslandMapScene')
scene_transition_map.GameScene → GameScene (next level): LevelCompletePopup 'Next Level' → director.emit('levelComplete_nextLevel') → GameScene re-initialises with next level id
scene_transition_map.SystemOverlay fade: all scene transitions use SystemOverlay (z_order=30) fade in/out, colour #F7EDD8 (island_sand), duration ≤0.4s each way

save_and_sync_contract.auth_endpoint: POST /v1/auth/anonymous, body: { device_id, platform: 'ios'|'android'|'taptap' }, response: { token, player_id, is_new_player, expires_at }
save_and_sync_contract.save_failure_behaviour: console.warn only; local progress always preserved in ProgressionManager (localStorage-backed)
save_and_sync_contract.local_resume_key: localStorage key 'glow_island_resume_level' — written by exitMidSession(), cleared by GameSession._clearResumeEntry() on successful start()
save_and_sync_contract.local_save_key: localStorage key 'glow_island_save' (injected by E2E tests to bypass tutorial)

automation_test_route.description: Full automated route from cold launch to level complete (mirrors E2E TC-001)
steps: 2. waitForSelector('canvas', { state: 'visible', timeout: 30000 }) + waitForTimeout(2000) — engine init
3. Locate 'Start Game' button (text='Start Game') or clickCanvas(0.5, 0.6) as fallback — enter LevelSelectScene
4. waitForTimeout(1500) — scene load; verify URL contains 'game' or 'level=1' or page text matches /level\s*1/i
7. clickCanvas(0.5, 0.35) — select adjacent matching tile → triggers tryMatch(), TILE_CONNECT SFX, TILE_DISAPPEAR SFX
8. waitForTimeout(800) — match animation completes, combo label may update
9. Repeat steps 5-8 two more times at (0.45+i*0.05, 0.4) offsets — completes 3 matches
10. waitForTimeout(3000) — allow auto-save interval; intercept PUT /v1/save request
11. Verify LevelCompletePopup visible OR moves counter decremented (acceptance: no crash, combo/score text present)
12. If LevelCompletePopup visible: tap 'Back to Map' or 'Next Level' button
acceptance_criteria: canvas renders within 30s of page load (no blank screen)
level 1-1 board initialised (4x4 grid, 16 tiles per INLINE_FALLBACK_LEVELS[0])
at least one successful tile match (tryMatch returns true, tile nodes deactivated)
no unhandled JS errors in browser console
PUT /v1/save request fired within 5s of level actions (if backend running)
LevelCompletePopup OR IslandMapScene reached as a completion outcome

failure_recovery_matrix.network_timeout_on_auth: anonymous auth retried; game proceeds to main menu in offline mode after timeout
failure_recovery_matrix.level_not_found: LevelLoader throws; GameScene logs error; board not initialised; player sees blank scene; fix: ensure all-levels.json or INLINE_FALLBACK_LEVELS covers the requested levelId
failure_recovery_matrix.fail_popup_node_missing: GameScene._onSessionFailed() fallback: director.loadScene('IslandMapScene') after 2s — graceful degradation without FailPopup UI
failure_recovery_matrix.level_complete_popup_missing: GameScene._onSessionEnded() fallback: director.loadScene('IslandMapScene') after 1.5s — graceful degradation without LevelCompletePopup UI
failure_recovery_matrix.sync_to_cloud_failure: console.warn; local ProgressionManager state preserved; no UX interruption
failure_recovery_matrix.board_overrun: ObstacleManager.isBoardOverrun() → GameSession.failNow() → SESSION_FAILED event → FailPopup shown
failure_recovery_matrix.swap_selection_timeout: SwapSelectionOverlay auto-cancels after 10s; BoardEventManager.cancelSwapSelection() fires; gameplay resumes normally
failure_recovery_matrix.deadlock_no_valid_moves: TileGrid._onTilesSettled() stub — deadlock detection not yet implemented; future: offer reshuffle or auto-fail

transitions.trigger: GameSession.onMoveMade() with movesRemaining==0 and !objectivesMet, OR GameSession.failNow()

validation_notes: Critical path exists: loading → authenticated → island_map → level_start → gameplay → level_complete → result_to_map. All transitions are implemented in source code.
Automated route confirmed from E2E TC-001: page.goto → waitForCanvas → click Start → click tiles → verify level entered → screenshot.
Continue flow confirmed: GameSession.continue() (failed → playing) deducts CONTINUE_GLOWSTONE_COST=6, adds CONTINUE_MOVES_ADDED=5, capped at CONTINUE_MAX=3. Star penalty: continuesUsed > 0 → 1 star.

Exit mid-session confirmed: GameSession.exitMidSession() writes localStorage key 'glow_island_resume_level'; MainMenuScene._onContinue() reads ProgressionManager for lastLevel and fires director.loadScene('GameScene').
Cloud save confirmed: LevelCompletePopup.show() → ProgressionManager.syncToCloud() → PUT /v1/save/:player_id. E2E TC-001 intercepts this request.
Failure recovery: both LevelCompletePopup and FailPopup have node-missing fallbacks (director.loadScene('IslandMapScene')) so the critical path cannot dead-end.
Scene transition map is complete: all director.loadScene() calls in MainMenuScene, LevelCompletePopup, and GameScene are enumerated.
Zen mode path included: ZenModeManager slot-consumption, toast on quota-exhausted, and zenComplete event documented.
GameSessionState type from source: 'loading' | 'playing' | 'paused' | 'levelComplete' | 'failed' — matches all states in this contract.
Board-overrun path confirmed: ObstacleManager.isBoardOverrun() → GameSession.failNow() — same FailPopup flow as move-exhaustion.
